title: Crispy Brazilian Herbs Stir-fry
description: This herby and crispy dish is a nostalgic twist on traditional Brazilian cuisine, perfect for adding to your low-sodium meal options.

ingredients.name: Herbs (dried)
ingredients.amount: 6-8 leaves of cilantro, 3-4 sprigs of parsley

instructions: Slice onions and bell peppers thinly.
Wash and cut broccoli into small florets.
Combine olive oil with salt and herbs in a mixing bowl until well mixed.
In a large skillet, heat the herb-oil mixture over medium-high heat.
Add sliced vegetables to the skillet. Stir-fry for about 5 minutes or until tender but still crisp.
Stir in sunflower seeds and continue cooking for another minute until lightly toasted.
Remove from heat and serve immediately.
